request.title: NTP Parcel Schema
request.description: NTP profile parcel schema for POST request

name.description: Set hostname or IP address of server

key.description: Set authentication key for the server

insecureConfiguration.description: NTP server configured without authentication - vulnerable
insecureConfiguration.reason: NTP configuration lacks authentication, allowing potential time manipulation attacks
insecureConfiguration.remediation: Configure a valid auth key and make it trusted

vpn.description: Set VPN in which NTP server is located

sourceInterface.description: Set interface to use to reach NTP server

md5Value.description: Enter cleartext or AES-encrypted MD5 authentication key [Note: Catalyst SD-WAN Manager will encrypt this field before saving. Cleartext strings will not be returned back to the user in GET responses for sensitive fields.]

insecureConfiguration.description: NTP authentication using MD5 - vulnerable to collision attacks and should use stronger algorithms
insecureConfiguration.reason: Configuration employs an Insecure method for password storage
insecureConfiguration.remediation: Transition to more secure algorithms like SHA and AES

insecureConfiguration.description: NTP authentication using MD5 - vulnerable to collision attacks and should use stronger algorithms
insecureConfiguration.reason: Configuration employs an Insecure method for password storage
insecureConfiguration.remediation: Transition to more secure algorithms like SHA and AES

hmacSha2Value.description: HMAC-SHA2-256 (digest length = 256 bits, key length = [1-32] bytes)

default.description: HMAC-SHA2-256 (digest length = 256 bits, key length = [1-32] bytes)

value.description: HMAC-SHA2-256 (digest length = 256 bits, key length = [1-32] bytes)

cmacAes128Value.description: CMAC-AES-128 (digest length = 128 bits, key length = [16 or 32] bytes)

default.description: CMAC-AES-128 (digest length = 128 bits, key length = [16 or 32] bytes)

value.description: CMAC-AES-128 (digest length = 128 bits, key length = [16 or 32] bytes)

documentation.description: This is the documentation for POST request schema for NTP profile parcel
